commands.review_summary:
The PR changes the unified menu-bar Show most-used provider path to rank only providers resolved for Overview and adds focused tests for that filtered highest-usage selection.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a feature PR rather than a broken existing-behavior report. Source inspection confirms current main ranks highest usage globally before Overview selection, and the PR adds a synthetic invariant for the desired behavior.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining action is maintainer product acceptance, exact-head CI, and proof review rather than a narrow automated code repair.

target.title: Scope most-used provider to Overview selection
target.body:
> **Status: product hold.** Recommendation: land this rewrite, but do not merge until the owner accepts the Overview-selection coupling and exact-head CI is green.

## Summary

- Reuse the existing Overview provider selection as the candidate set for **Show most-used provider**.
- Keep the established closest-to-rate-limit ranking inside that subset.
- Avoid a second provider filter, new persisted settings, and cross-provider token/dollar comparisons with incompatible windows.

Closes #1743.

## Behavior

If Overview contains Codex and Claude, the unified icon ranks only Codex and Claude even when another enabled provider has a higher percentage. An explicitly empty Overview selection falls back through the existing unified-icon behavior.

Issue #1777 remains a separate product request. Token/spend ranking is intentionally deferred until comparable windows, provider eligibility, and empty-result fallback semantics are defined.

## Owner decision requested

**Decision:** Should **Show most-used provider** use the existing Overview selection as its eligibility set?

**Tradeoff:** This avoids a second provider filter and keeps one mental model, but changing Overview membership also changes which provider may appear in the unified icon.

**Recommendation:** **Land this rewrite.** It directly implements #1743 with no new persisted settings and preserves the existing closest-to-limit ranking. Keep the PR unmerged only until this product coupling is accepted and exact-head CI is green.

## Validation

- `swift test --filter 'UsageStoreHighestUsageTests|StatusItemAnimationSignatureTests'` — 31 tests passed
- `make check`
- branch autoreview — clean, no actionable findings (0.86 confidence)
- full `make test` — all 43 shards passed (one Kiro timing failure passed on the built-in retry)

## Scope

Net diff against the PR merge base: 4 files, +72/-9. The original broad settings/ranking implementation was rewritten in place; contributor history and credit remain on this PR.
